scripts.lint: pnpm frontend:lint && uv run ruff check backend custom_components scripts && uv run mypy backend/cultivation_assistant
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.backend:migrate: uv run alembic -c backend/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.docker:build: pnpm sync:addon && docker build -t cultivation-assistant:dev cultivation
